message:
fix: use AFSC_BASE_IMAGE constant consistently, fix test assertions

- Made AFSC_BASE_IMAGE constant public so executor.rs can reference it
  instead of hardcoding "afsc-base:latest" (prevents silent divergence)
- Updated 4 test assertions to expect "afsc-base:latest" as the default
  Docker image (was "ubuntu:22.04" before the base image change)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
